texto: In my meditations, I find that nothing in life counts more than the happiness we can give others, the good that we can do. This is what we must teach our children, to think of others more than they think of themselves, for it is in this way they will find the most noble satisfaction of all. ~ Maurice Drouhin writing to his wife from prison in 1941
explicacao: Orientação direta de Don Kladstrup sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “In my meditations, I find that nothing in life counts more than the happiness we can give others,…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, children, good, útil em momentos de good e happiness.

texto: He always said that when you are hiring someone, look at the quality of the person. It is very easy to find a good technician; it's much harder and more important to have a good person. ~ Robert Drouhin repeating what his father Maurice told him
explicacao: Citação de Don Kladstrup sobre temas ligados a familia. “He always said that when you are hiring someone, look at the quality of the person. It is very ea…” articula familia, good, hiring em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como hiring e person.
